executives.name: Shantanu Narayen
executives.background: Mr. Narayen has served as Chair of the Board since January 2017, as Chief Executive Officer since December 2007 and as President since January 2005. He has been a director since September 2007. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from July 2005 to December 2007.

tenure_dates.title: Chair of the Board, Chief Executive Officer, Director, President

executives.name: Dan Durn
executives.background: Mr. Durn has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since October 2021. Prior to joining Adobe, he was Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Applied Materials, Inc. from 2017 to 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: David Wadhwani
executives.background: Mr. Wadhwani has served as President, Digital Media Business since June 2021. He previously served as President and CEO of AppDynamics from 2015 to 2020 and was at Adobe from 2005 to 2015 in various leadership roles.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Manager, Digital Media

executives.name: Anil Chakravarthy
executives.background: Mr. Chakravarthy has served as President, Digital Experience Business since January 2020. Prior to joining Adobe, he was Chief Executive Officer of Informatica LLC from 2016 to 2020.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Manager, Digital Experience (later President, Customer Experience Orchestration)

executives.name: Dana Rao
executives.background: Mr. Rao has served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Trust Officer since June 2018. He joined Adobe in 2012.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Trust Officer
Executive Vice President, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary (also served as Chief Trust Officer)

executives.name: Amy Banse
executives.background: Former Managing Director and Head of Funds for Comcast Ventures. Director since 2012.

executives.name: Bernadette Lin
executives.background: Former CEO of Gong.io. Director since 2023.

executives.name: Brett Biggs
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Walmart Inc. Director since 2022.

executives.name: Bruce Chizen
executives.background: Former CEO of Adobe Systems Incorporated.

executives.name: David Ricks
executives.background: Chair and CEO of Eli Lilly and Company. Director since 2018.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Dheeraj Pandey
executives.background: Co-founder and CEO of DevRev. Former CEO of Nutanix. Director since 2021.

executives.name: Edward Barnholt
executives.background: Edward Barnholt is the Chairman of the Board of KLA. He was formerly the President and CEO of Agilent Technologies, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Frank Calderoni
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Anaplan, Inc. Director since 2012.

executives.name: Jeff Lord
executives.background: Former CEO of various technology companies. Director since 2008.

executives.name: Laura Desmond
executives.background: Founder and CEO of Eagle Eight. Former CEO of Starcom Mediavest Group. Director since 2012.

executives.name: Mark Garrett
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Adobe Systems Incorporated.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Melanie Boulden
executives.background: Chief Growth Officer of Tyson Foods, Inc. Director since 2022.

executives.name: Michael Cannon
executives.background: Mr. Cannon has been a director since 2011. He was President of Global Operations at Dell Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Shantanu Narayen
board_of_directors.background: Chair of the Board and CEO of Adobe. Joined the board in 2007.
